task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST application window is open with '4StoreyBuilding' visible in the title bar or project tree.

task_completion.description: Navigate to the target zone (T.C35) or its corresponding roof plenum (T.C40)
task_completion.visual_evidence: The eQUEST component tree or spreadsheet view shows zone 'T.C35' (or 'T.C40') selected or expanded.

task_completion.description: Add a skylight with 20 ft by 20 ft dimensions
task_completion.visual_evidence: A skylight properties dialog or spreadsheet row is visible showing Width = 20 and Height = 20 (or Area = 400) assigned to the roof surface.

task_completion.description: Position the skylight with X-offset 15 ft and Y-offset 15 ft
task_completion.visual_evidence: The skylight properties window or spreadsheet shows the X-offset (or X) value as 15 and the Y-offset (or Y) value as 15.

task_completion.description: Set the glass type for the skylight
task_completion.visual_evidence: The glass type dropdown or field for the skylight shows a double clear glass selection (e.g., 'Window Type #1 GT' or similar).
A simulation progress bar, a 'Simulation Complete' dialog, or the eQUEST results viewer is visible.
The 'File' menu is open with 'Save' being clicked, a save confirmation dialog appears, or the title bar shows no asterisk (indicating unsaved changes) after modifications were made.

integrity.description: Agent used the eQUEST GUI to make changes
integrity.visual_evidence: Screenshots show interaction with eQUEST dialog boxes, component trees, and spreadsheet views rather than a text editor.

integrity.description: Agent did not bypass the UI by editing the .inp file directly
integrity.visual_evidence: No text editors (like Notepad, VS Code, or Vim) are open showing the 4StoreyBuilding.inp file contents.

integrity.description: Simulation was actually run within the software
integrity.visual_evidence: The DOE-2.2 simulation dialog matches the native eQUEST interface and shows actual calculation progress, not a mocked or skipped step.

privileged_info_for_vlm: Project path: C:\Users\Docker\Documents\eQUEST 3-65 Projects\4StoreyBuilding\4StoreyBuilding.inp. Target zone is T.C35 (X=15, Y=15). Note 1: The task asks for glass type 'Gt 1 (Dbl Clr Air)', but this does not exist in the model; accept any available double clear glass type (e.g., 'Window Type #1 GT' or 'Window Type #2 GT'). Note 2: T.C35 has no roof surface (only a ceiling to plenum T.C40). The agent may add the skylight to T.C40's roof or create a new roof for T.C35; accept either as a valid workaround for the task's logical error.
